Package org.savantbuild.dep

Interface DependencyListener

public interface DependencyListener
This interface is a listener that is notified when the DependencyService fetches and publishes artifacts.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    artifactFetched(ResolvedArtifact artifact)
    Handle when an artifact is fetched by a mediator.
    void
    artifactPublished(Artifact artifact)
    Handle when an artifact is published by a mediator.

  • Method Details

    • artifactFetched

      void artifactFetched(ResolvedArtifact artifact)
      Handle when an artifact is fetched by a mediator.
      Parameters:
      artifact - The artifact fetched.

    • artifactPublished

      void artifactPublished(Artifact artifact)
      Handle when an artifact is published by a mediator.
      Parameters:
      artifact - The artifact being published.
